name: marrybrown-plenty-valley
description: MarryBrown Plenty Valley - DigiBoard Operations Dashboard & POS System

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:pos"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:pos && npm run build:api
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:shared && npm run install:api && npm run install:dashboard && npm run install:pos
